'''Blatta''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who [[Uran Lavint]] owed [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and was her co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] onboard the ''[[Breathe My Jets]]'' when she was running a large shipment of [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] supplies to the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]]. He, along with several other smugglers, were sold out by Lavint for credits, and were arrested by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
